primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex -- Official Journal of the European Union

published: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 -- AI management system (Clause 7.2 Competence, 7.3 Awareness)
ISO/IEC TR 24368:2022 -- Overview of ethical and societal concerns
upcoming: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for AI literacy (expected Q4 2026)

obligations.source_quote: Providers and deployers of AI systems shall take measures to ensure, to their best extent, a sufficient level of AI literacy of their staff and other persons dealing with the operation and use of AI systems on their behalf, taking into account their technical knowledge, experience, education and training and the context the AI systems are to be used in, and considering the persons or groups of persons on whom the AI systems are to be used.

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider/deployer must take measures to ensure AI literacy
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL take measures to ensure a sufficient level of AI literacy

decomposed_atoms.description: AI literacy must cover staff dealing with operation and use
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Literacy SHALL cover staff and other persons dealing with operation and use of AI systems on their behalf

decomposed_atoms.description: Must consider technical knowledge, experience, education, training, and context
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL take into account technical knowledge, experience, education and training and the context the AI systems are to be used in

decomposed_atoms.description: Must consider persons on whom the AI systems are to be used
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL consider the persons or groups of persons on whom the AI systems are to be used
